title: Single cell multi-miRNAs quantification with hydrogel microbeads for liver cancer cell subtypes discrimination.
author: Wang Y Fang Y Zhu Y Bi S Liu Y Ju H
content: S-EPMC8848760 PMC8848760 Single cell multi-miRNAs quantification with hydrogel microbeads for liver cancer cell subtypes discrimination. The simultaneous quantification of multi-miRNAs in single cells reveals cellular heterogeneity, and benefits the subtypes discrimination of cancer cells . Though
